# services.sftpgo

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.sftpgo`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.sftpgo.dataDir` | `absolute path` | The directory where SFTPGo stores its data files. |
| `services.sftpgo.enable` | `boolean` | sftpgo |
| `services.sftpgo.extraArgs` | `list of string` | Additional command line arguments to pass to the sftpgo daemon. |
| `services.sftpgo.extraReadWriteDirs` | `list of absolute path` | Extra directories where SFTPGo is allowed to write to. |
| `services.sftpgo.group` | `string` | Group name under which SFTPGo runs. |
| `services.sftpgo.loadDataFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path to a json file containing users and folders to load (or update) on startup. Check the [documentation](https://sftpgo.github.io/latest/config-file/) for the `--loaddata-from` command line argument for more info. |
| `services.sftpgo.package` | `package` | The sftpgo package to use. |
| `services.sftpgo.settings` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | The primary sftpgo configuration. See the [configuration reference](https://sftpgo.github.io/latest/config-file/) for possible values. |
| `services.sftpgo.settings.ftpd.bindings` | `list of (open submodule of (JSON value))` | Configure listen addresses and ports for ftpd. |
| `services.sftpgo.settings.ftpd.bindings.*.address` | `string` | Network listen address. Leave blank to listen on all available network interfaces. On \*NIX you can specify an absolute path to listen on a Unix-domain socket. |
| `services.sftpgo.settings.ftpd.bindings.*.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port for serving FTP requests. Setting the port to `0` disables listening on this interface binding. |
| `services.sftpgo.settings.httpd.bindings` | `list of (open submodule of (JSON value))` | Configure listen addresses and ports for httpd. |
| `services.sftpgo.settings.httpd.bindings.*.address` | `string` | Network listen address. Leave blank to listen on all available network interfaces. On \*NIX you can specify an absolute path to listen on a Unix-domain socket. |
| `services.sftpgo.settings.httpd.bindings.*.enable_web_admin` | `boolean` | Enable the built-in web admin for this interface binding. |
| `services.sftpgo.settings.httpd.bindings.*.enable_web_client` | `boolean` | Enable the built-in web client for this interface binding. |
| `services.sftpgo.settings.httpd.bindings.*.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port for serving HTTP(S) requests. Setting the port to `0` disables listening on this interface binding. |
| `services.sftpgo.settings.sftpd.bindings` | `list of (open submodule of (JSON value))` | Configure listen addresses and ports for sftpd. |
| `services.sftpgo.settings.sftpd.bindings.*.address` | `string` | Network listen address. Leave blank to listen on all available network interfaces. On \*NIX you can specify an absolute path to listen on a Unix-domain socket. |
| `services.sftpgo.settings.sftpd.bindings.*.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port for serving SFTP requests. Setting the port to `0` disables listening on this interface binding. |
| `services.sftpgo.settings.smtp` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | SMTP configuration section. |
| `services.sftpgo.settings.smtp.auth_type` | `one of 0, 1, 2` | - `0`: Plain - `1`: Login - `2`: CRAM-MD5 |
| `services.sftpgo.settings.smtp.encryption` | `one of 0, 1, 2` | Encryption scheme: - `0`: No encryption - `1`: TLS - `2`: STARTTLS |
| `services.sftpgo.settings.smtp.from` | `string` | From address. |
| `services.sftpgo.settings.smtp.host` | `string` | Location of SMTP email server. Leave empty to disable email sending capabilities. |
| `services.sftpgo.settings.smtp.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port of the SMTP Server. |
| `services.sftpgo.settings.smtp.user` | `string` | SMTP username. |
| `services.sftpgo.settings.webdavd.bindings` | `list of (open submodule of (JSON value))` | Configure listen addresses and ports for webdavd. |
| `services.sftpgo.settings.webdavd.bindings.*.address` | `string` | Network listen address. Leave blank to listen on all available network interfaces. On \*NIX you can specify an absolute path to listen on a Unix-domain socket. |
| `services.sftpgo.settings.webdavd.bindings.*.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port for serving WebDAV requests. Setting the port to `0` disables listening on this interface binding. |
| `services.sftpgo.user` | `string` | User account name under which SFTPGo runs. |
